title: Signal Garden 2026-06-26
subtitle: Daily community relay puzzle for route sharing and comment-driven play.

copy.shortCaption: Daily community relay puzzle: 3/3 beacons, 2/5 mirrors, 1008 points. Open the Review link, replay the route, then reply with your own path.
copy.longCaption: Signal Garden 2026-06-26 turns a tiny mirror-route puzzle into a public community loop. Review in under a minute: open the route, replay the beam, import sample comments, and compare the top route rationale. The build is static, source-visible, and designed to be checked without private account data.
copy.firstCommentCta: Reply with a Review link or a short coordinate route like `r3c3\ r7c3\`; Signal Garden can import routes, skip duplicates, and explain the current leader.
copy.altText: Signal Garden share card for 2026-06-26: 3/3 beacons, 2/5 mirrors, 1008 points, public review links included.
